description_long: This sculpture depicts a standing anthropomorphic figure with the head of a jackal, reminiscent of the ancient Egyptian god Anubis. The figure stands upright on a rectangular base, with arms held close to the sides and legs together. The head is elongated with prominent ears and a pointed snout, while the body is stylized and smooth, lacking intricate surface details. The entire sculpture is rendered in a uniform, dark brown material that suggests either wood or bronze. The surface appears matte with minimal reflectivity, and the form is solid and monolithic. The base is flat and stable, allowing the sculpture to stand securely on level surfaces.
description: A dark brown, stylized jackal-headed humanoid sculpture standing upright on a rectangular base, with smooth, matte surfaces and minimal detailing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the jackal-headed figure's face, chest, and both arms held close to the sides.
description_view_1: Left side profile highlighting the elongated snout, upright ears, and the straight posture of the figure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, body, and the rectangular base, with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Right side profile similar to the left, showing the jackal head's profile and the figure's straight stance.
attribute_subject_matter: jackal-headed humanoid figure, reminiscent of Anubis
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
